Name: Ayush Anand
Description_Title: Front-end engineer focused on building fast, accessible, and maintainable web applications. I specialize in
Tech_Desc_1: Building enterprise UI applications with Angular (v6 through v21), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap.
Tech_Desc_2: Designing responsive interfaces and component libraries for complex, data-driven products.
Tech_Desc_3: Full SDLC ownership — analysis, architecture, development, testing, and production support.
Tech_Desc_4: Single Page Application development with lazy loading, deferred views, and optimized bundles.
Tech_Desc_5: Code reviews, mentoring, and establishing front-end standards across teams.
Tech_Desc_6: Agile delivery in Scrum environments with daily stand-ups and JIRA-based tracking.
Tech_Desc_7: Version control with Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, and SVN.
Tech_Desc_8: Daily tooling: VS Code, IntelliJ, and modern browser dev tools.
Corporate_Environment_Desc: of professional experience delivering production-grade front-end solutions.
Upgraded_Angular_17: Upgraded to Angular 21 with modern control flow and deferred loading.
Lazy_Loading_Deferred: Viewport-based deferred loading for better performance
Automatic_Migration_Control_Flow: Migrated legacy templates to built-in control flow
Improved_Build_Performance_ESBuild: Faster builds with the Angular application builder
